Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IRepairableInputReasoner

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstrExpr, AdversarialReasoner, ContImplHypRewrites
public interface IRepairableInputReasoner
Common protocol for reasoners that are able to repair their broken input.
Since:
2.3

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IReasonerInput
    repair(IReasonerInputReader reader)
    Tries to repair an input after a SerializeException has occurred.

  • Method Details

    • repair

      IReasonerInput repair(IReasonerInputReader reader)
      Tries to repair an input after a SerializeException has occurred.
      Parameters:
      reader - an input reader
      Returns:
      the repaired input, or null in case of failure
